query: ALTER TABLE userSubscriptions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS renewalDate DATETIME, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cancelledAt DATETIME, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reason VARCHAR(255);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute ALTER TABLE userSubscriptions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS startDate DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS renewalDate DATETIME, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cancelledAt DATETIME, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reason VARCHAR(255);
